landing.title: AIAH - Your AI Life System
landing.subtitle: Schedule. Budget. Goals. Training. Growth. All managed by one AI.
landing.description: AIAH is an AI life system that manages your schedule, budget, goals, training, and growth in one place.
landing.feature.memory.title: Knows Your Full Picture
landing.feature.memory.desc: Your AI learns your schedule, goals, finances, and habits to deliver personalized action plans
landing.feature.coaching.title: AI Life Coach
landing.feature.coaching.desc: Practice negotiations, interviews, pitches, and tough conversations with real-time coaching
landing.feature.connection.title: Daily Action Plans
landing.feature.connection.desc: Get a daily plan that covers goals, habits, budget, fitness, and priorities in one view
landing.pricing.title: Simple, Fair Pricing
landing.pricing.tier.free.name: Free
landing.pricing.tier.free.features: Daily check-ins, Basic chat, Limited coaching
landing.pricing.tier.plus.name: Plus
landing.pricing.tier.plus.features: Unlimited coaching, Voice mode, Goal & budget tracking
landing.pricing.tier.pro.name: Pro
landing.pricing.tier.pro.features: Everything in Plus, Family sharing, Advanced analytics, Priority support

onboarding.step1.title: Welcome to AIAH
onboarding.step1.description: Let's set up your profile so your AI can build your system
onboarding.step2.title: Your Priorities
onboarding.step2.description: Tell us what areas of your life need the most attention
onboarding.step3.title: Your Focus Area
onboarding.step3.description: Where do you want the most improvement?
onboarding.step4.title: Your First Goal
onboarding.step4.description: What's one goal you want to crush first?
onboarding.step5.title: You're Ready

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.interaction_help: Log a win - workout done, money saved, goal hit. Every step counts.

coaching.title: Practice
coaching.subtitle: Rehearse real situations
coaching.description: Practice negotiations, interviews, pitches, and tough conversations with your AI coach. Get feedback on what worked and what to improve.
coaching.scenario.difficult_conversation.title: Difficult Conversation
coaching.scenario.difficult_conversation.desc: Practice having a tough talk with someone important
coaching.scenario.friendship.title: Networking & Outreach
coaching.scenario.friendship.desc: Practice reaching out and building professional relationships
coaching.scenario.networking.title: Networking
coaching.scenario.networking.desc: Practice making genuine connections at events
coaching.scenario.boundaries.title: Setting Boundaries
coaching.scenario.vulnerability.title: Salary Negotiation
coaching.scenario.vulnerability.desc: Practice presenting your value and handling pushback

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Track your progress
goals.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this goal?
